zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Roses Grysell於1546年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布拉福德時，她的父親Godly Grysell21歲，母親Maud Parent16歲。她於1567年與Thomas Treathone在英國英格蘭素福爾可布拉福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1633年在她的家鄉享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Roses Grysell于1546年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可布拉福德时，她的父亲Godly Grysell21岁，母亲Maud Parent16岁。她于1567年与Thomas Treathone在英国英格兰素福爾可布拉福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1633年在她的家乡享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: Roses
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, the English form of the name of the patriarch (Moshe in Hebrew) who led the Israelites out of Egypt (Exodus 4). His name is thought to be of Egyptian origin, most probably from the same root as that found in the second element of names such as Tutmosis and Rameses, where it means ‘born of (a certain god)’. Various Hebrew etymologies have been proposed, beginning with the biblical ‘saved (from the water)’ (Exodus 2:10), but none is convincing. It is now mainly a Jewish name, although until the mid-20th century it also enjoyed considerable popularity among Christians in England, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Roses Grysell was born in 1546, in Bramford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Godly Grysell, was 21 and her mother, Maud Parent, was 16. She married Thomas Treathone in 1567, in Bramford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died in 1633, in her hometown, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Roses Grysell est née en 1546, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Godly Grysell, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Maud Parent, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Treathone en 1567, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1633, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Roses Grysell 1546 in Bramford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godly Grysell 21 und ihre Mutter Maud Parent 16. Sie hat 1567 in Bramford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas Treathone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1633 im Alter von 87 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Roses Grysell è nata il nel 1546 nel Bramford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Godly Grysell, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Maud Parent, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Treathone nel 1567, nel Bramford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1633, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Roses Grysell(이)가 1546년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godly Grysell(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Parent(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 Thomas Treathone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1633년 그녀의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Roses Grysell nasceu em 1546, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Godly Grysell, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Maud Parent, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Treathone em 1567, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1633, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Roses Grysell родилась в 1546 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Godly Grysell было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Maud Parent, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Treathone в 1567 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1633 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Roses Grysell nació en 1546, en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Godly Grysell, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Maud Parent, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Thomas Treathone en 1567, en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió en 1633, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años.
